description:
Returns the name of a unit's current primary animation. Seems to be forced to lower case in {{arma3}}.
{{Feature|informative| Up until {{GVI|arma3|2.20}} this command only worked for a man unit, and other units such as animals couldn't use this command. As of {{GVI|arma3|2.22}} animals are supported as well. }}
name: animationState
